raw.message:
🔥 Love matchdays? Get a Free Bet Builder every Sunday on any match! ⚽🎯
Sign up, claim, and start building. 18+ and T&Cs apply*

hook.summary: Fast-paced brand and slogan introduction on a vibrant red background.
hook.visual_action: The Virgin Bet logo appears, followed by sliding text overlays 'LOVE GOALS' and 'LOVE MATCHDAYS'.
hook.text_overlay: Virgin BET A GOOD BET LOVE GOALS LOVE MATCHDAYS

scene_flow: Brand identity reveal with logo and slogan on a solid red background.
Rapid-fire text overlays highlighting football-related 'love' themes like goals and matchdays.
Presentation of the 'Free Bet Builder' offer featuring diverse users holding a smartphone.
Details of the Sunday match promotion with a close-up of the app interface and a smiling user.
Closing with mandatory responsible gambling messaging and brand logo.
on_screen_text: *Members only. To Qualify: min £10 bets on sportsbook in previous 7 days. Free Bet for Bet Builder on any football match played this Sunday (min 3 sel & odds EVS). Max 1/ Member. £1 - £20. Stakes not returned. T&Cs apply.
audience_proxy: Adult sports fans in the UK looking for football betting offers and app-based wagering.
